reasoning: The Polymarket implied probability for this event settling to 'Yes' was 1% on May 15, 2025. Evaluating the 2025 box office slate, "How to Train Your Dragon" faces extremely stiff competition from major blockbusters expected to have colossal opening weekends, such as "Avatar: Fire and Ash", "Superman", "Jurassic World: Rebirth", "Minecraft", "Zootopia 2", and "Fantastic Four: First Steps". While HTTYD is a popular franchise, preceding animated installments opened in the $40-$55 million range. Even with a generous live-action multiplier, it is highly improbable that its opening weekend will out-gross the debut of every single other film released in 2025. Given the sheer number of highly anticipated mega-tentpoles releasing throughout the year, the likelihood of HTTYD securing the #1 spot for the entire year's biggest domestic opening weekend is vanishingly small. I am placing the probability at 2%, in line with the extremely low market valuation.
